  • Classes in io.forja.builder used by io.forja.builder
    Class
    Description
    FxComponentBuilder
    Abstract base builder for all Forja component builders.
    FxNodeBuilder
    Abstract base builder for Forja component builders whose target is a Node but not a Control.

    FxComponentBuilder
    Abstract base builder for all Forja component builders.
